name: smithy-large
summary: A working urban smithy — more than a dungeon forge. Multiple stations (master anvil + apprentice anvils), visible shop counter, retail display toward the street.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: wide rectangle with a clear street-facing edge

primary_palette.note: master forge + apprentice anvils — a training smithy
twin-forge operation, two masters or master+journeyman
single forge retail smithy — street-facing counter primary

story_prompts: mid-commission war contract — every anvil occupied, soot thick
end-of-day — forges banked, apprentices sweeping, master at the ledger
retail hours — master at the counter haggling while apprentice hammers
closed for mourning — forge cold, door draped

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: working light (0.4) with hot forge glow zones

anti_patterns: forges against back wall with implied chimneys — never centerfloor
customer area (counter, displays) near the street — separate from the hot zone
don't mix smithy hazard cells with customer-facing floor space
